steps.title: Translate the counts
steps.content:
Let $n$ = number of 9-inch parts. Then 8-inch parts $=4n$, and 3-inch parts $=30$. Total parts:
$$4n + n + 30 = 100$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
$$5n + 30 = 100$$
Note: the equation counts parts, not lengths, so we don't multiply by 8, 9, or 3.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
